failure_signature: TDD skill was optionally triggered but user wanted tests to run automatically before every commit, not just when explicitly asked
user_correction: User set up a pre-commit hook to run tests instead of relying on skill
remedy: Test execution that must happen deterministically (before commits, on file save) should be implemented as a hook, not an optional skill.

failure_signature: TDD skill generated tests but they lacked edge case coverage and assertions were incomplete — tests passed but did not verify behavior
user_correction: User manually added additional test cases and assertions
remedy: TDD skill should enforce a checklist: test happy path, edge cases, error conditions, and boundary values. Include assertion templates for common patterns.
